title: Monaco-2025 Rule-Shift Specialist
summary: A dated rules change created a one-off strategy regime: on February 26, 2025, F1 approved mandatory two-stop Monaco races, which materially changes next-lap pit propensity relative to normal Monaco logic and should not be pooled blindly with other races.
rationale: A dated rules change created a one-off strategy regime: on February 26, 2025, F1 approved mandatory two-stop Monaco races, which materially changes next-lap pit propensity relative to normal Monaco logic and should not be pooled blindly with other races.
implementation_hint: Add a `Year==2025 && Race==Monaco` specialist branch or blend expert with strong interactions on position, stint, progress, compound, and tyre-life pressure; validate with `Year_Race` grouping so the tiny slice cannot leak through generic folds.
expected_effect: Small but plausible public-LB gain from correctly handling an outlier regime that generic window heuristics will under-model.
risk: Very small sample; can overfit local CV unless the specialist is heavily regularized and only activated on Monaco 2025 rows.
